metadata.title: About Tigre — Our Story, Mission & Fast Food Delivery Vision
metadata.description: Learn about Tigre's mission to deliver exceptional food in under 30 minutes. Discover our story, values, and commitment to speed and taste.

title: About Us
description: Learn more about Tigre and our mission to deliver the best food in your city.

hero.movementDescription: We didn't build just another delivery app. We built a movement — for people who demand great food, delivered with power and speed.

origin.title: The Origin
origin.mainTitle: From One Idea to a Movement
origin.quote: We were tired of waiting an hour for cold food. So we built something better.
origin.paragraph1: Tigre was born in 2021 out of pure frustration. Our founders — passionate food lovers and tech builders — saw a broken system: slow delivery, mediocre choices, and an experience that felt anything but premium.
origin.paragraph2: So they started over. They built a platform from the ground up, obsessing over every detail — from the speed of the app to the temperature of the food when it arrives. Tigre isn't just delivery. It's a promise.
origin.paragraph3: Today, we partner with over 500 restaurants, serve tens of thousands of orders daily, and we're only getting started.

values.title: What We Stand For
values.description: Every decision we make — from the restaurants we partner with to the riders we hire — is guided by a simple belief: great food deserves a great experience. These are the values that make Tigre, Tigre.
values.speedDescription: Fast doesn't mean careless. We've engineered our entire logistics system around one promise: hot food, fast.
values.passionDescription: We only partner with restaurants that genuinely care about what they cook. Quality is non-negotiable.
values.trustDescription: Transparent fees, honest reviews, and real support. We build relationships — with customers and partners alike.
values.diversityDescription: From street falafel to artisan pizza — we celebrate every cuisine, every culture, every craving.
values.techDescription: An app so smooth it feels invisible. Real-time tracking, instant checkout, zero friction. Technology you feel.
values.communityDescription: Tigre is more than an app — it's a community of food lovers, local chefs, and bold riders who love what they do.

promise.title: Our Promise to You
promise.description: We started Tigre because the world needed a delivery platform that actually cared — about food, speed, experience, and people. That mission hasn't changed. It never will.
